name: Skibidi Man: Search of Skibidi Girl
description: In one old skibidi village, a boy decided to meet a skibidi girl, and she fell in love with him at first sight, but she was stolen by the evil skibidi Bully. Now you have to help the boy find her Love... Many dangers await you along the way.
instructions: A - LEFT ARROW LEFT MOVE D - ARROW RIGHT RIGHT MOVE W SPACE - UP ARROW JUMP MOVE
tags: 1 Player, Action, Adventure, Arcade, Boy, Boys, Girl, Girls, Minecraft
